zh.Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾格倫加利
zh.lifeSummary: Miss Fraser of Lovat是Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat和Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat的女兒，出生。她於1400年之前與Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰音巴內-爾格倫加利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Miss Fraser of Lovat是Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat和Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat的女儿，出生。她于1400年之前与Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname borne by a leading Scottish family. It appears to be Norman in origin, the earliest forms recorded being de Frisselle and de Fresel(iere), but these do not correspond with any place name in France and may in fact represent a Gaelic name corrupted beyond recognition by an Anglo-Norman scribe.

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Transferred use of the surname borne by a leading Scottish family. It appears to be Norman in origin, the earliest forms recorded being de Frisselle and de Fresel(iere), but these do not correspond with any place name in France and may in fact represent a Gaelic name corrupted beyond recognition by an Anglo-Norman scribe.

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: Transferred use of the surname borne by a leading Scottish family. It appears to be Norman in origin, the earliest forms recorded being de Frisselle and de Fresel(iere), but these do not correspond with any place name in France and may in fact represent a Gaelic name corrupted beyond recognition by an Anglo-Norman scribe.

en.lifeSummary: Miss Fraser of Lovat was born as the daughter of Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat and Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat. She married Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry before 1400, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 6 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Miss Fraser of Lovat est née, fille de Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat et Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat. Elle a épousé Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry avant 1400, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Miss Fraser of Lovat wurde, als Tochter von Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat und Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat geboren. Sie hat vor 1400 in Europa Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Miss Fraser of Lovat è nata il come figlia di Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat e Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat. Lei sposato Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry prima del 1400, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli.

ja.Inverness-shire, Scotland: スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイア
ja.Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Scotland: イギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアグレンガーリー
ja.lifeSummary: Miss Fraser of LovatはHugh Fraser 4th of LovatとIsabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovatの娘として生まれた。1400年以前にヨーロッパでDonald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Miss Fraser of Lovat(은)는 Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat(와)과 Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1400년 이전 우럽에서 Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다.

mn.Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Scotland: Glengarry, Siorrachd Inbhir Nis, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Miss Fraser of Lovat nasceu filha de Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat e Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat. Ela casou-se com Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry antes 1400, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Miss Fraser of Lovat родилась. Её родителей звали Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat и Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry перед 1400 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей.

es.lifeSummary: Miss Fraser of Lovat nació como hija de Hugh Fraser 4th of Lovat y Isabell Wemyss of Kincaldrum, latterly Lovat. Se casó con Donald MacDonald 2nd of Glengarry antes de 1400, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos.
